National defence & dual-use hub

Your gateway to the world of defence and dual-use innovation

Find your path → Solutions database

We connect startups, research, industry and investors to accelerate the creation and deployment of technologies for defence, security and resilience. We guide you to programs such as NATO DIANA, EUDIS, EDF and EIC — and open the door to the international ecosystem.

Our mission

We build the ecosystem

We build the Czech defence and dual-use ecosystem and connect its players — startups, industry, research, investors and the armed forces.

Advisory for SMEs & startups

We navigate companies through the defence world — from the defence use-case through programs to application preparation.

Communication with end users

We open a dialogue between innovators, the military and end users, so technology solves real needs.

Hub

Pick your role and we will point you to the relevant opportunities and the second level of needs.

Company (Prime)

Manufacturing, supply chain, technology integration.

03

University

We identify opportunities

We help uncover the defence and dual-use potential of your technology.

Funding & acceleration programs

No need to read 20 pages. We show you which program is relevant for you.

Region
Applicant type
Call status
NATO DIANANATO · 2027
OPEN NOW · deadline 3 Jul 2026

NATO accelerator for emerging and disruptive technologies. We host NATO DIANA Czechia.

  • ✔€100,000 grant · equity-free
  • ✔200+ test centres across NATO
  • ✔6-month accelerator from Jan 2027
NATO DIANA Czechia →
EIC Defence 2026EU · EIC
OPEN NOW · deadline October 2026

EIC Accelerator dedicated call for defence and dual-use technologies 2026 — open for scale-up startups TRL 5–8.

  • ✔Grant + equity component
  • ✔TRL 5–8, scalable innovations
  • ✔Dual-use & defence focus
eic.ec.europa.eu — EIC Defence ↗
EUDIS AcceleratorEU · STARTUP
OPEN NOW · quarterly calls

6-month accelerator for startups and SMEs entering the EU defence sector.

  • ✔Business coaching & mentoring
  • ✔Matchmaking with prime contractors
  • ✔Test in Ukraine · live battlefield
eudis-business-accelerator.eu ↗
EUDIS STEPEU · STARTUP
OPEN NOW · rolling deadline

Support to Technological and Early Prototyping — grants for early-stage defence startups.

  • ✔Grant up to €100,000
  • ✔TRL 1–4, early prototyping
  • ✔No equity, no co-financing
ec.europa.eu — EUDIS STEP ↗
EUDIS Open CallEU · SME
OPEN NOW · rolling deadline

Open calls for SMEs and startups with dual-use technology — competitive grants from EDF.

  • ✔Grants €500k–€2M
  • ✔Connection to EDF consortia
  • ✔Defence & dual-use context
ec.europa.eu — EUDIS Open Call ↗
EDFEU · R&D
ROLLING CALLS

Largest EU programme financing collaborative defence R&D.

  • ✔Research · development
  • ✔Prototype · certification
  • ✔Cross-EU consortia
dotaceeu.cz — EDF ↗
EICEU · STARTUP
OPEN NOW · deadline October 2026

For deep-tech companies with global growth potential.

  • ✔Grant · equity
  • ✔EIC Accelerator up to €2.5M
  • ✔Pathfinder & Transition
horizontevropa.cz — EIC ↗
SAFEEU · DEFENCE
OPEN NOW · per call deadline

Security Action for Europe — EU instrument for strengthening the defence industry and joint procurement.

  • ✔Joint procurement across EU
  • ✔Industrial capacity support
  • ✔Link to EDF and EDIRPA
ec.europa.eu — SAFE ↗
ProDefCZ · RESEARCH
OPEN NOW · deadline 30 Sep 2026

TAČR programme for applied research and development for Czech defence and security needs.

  • ✔National TAČR programme
  • ✔Defence & security R&D
  • ✔Industry–academia cooperation
tacr.gov.cz — ProDef ↗
Horizon EuropeEU · R&I
ROLLING CALLS

Main EU R&I framework programme with relevance for dual-use and security technologies.

  • ✔Pillar II — Global Challenges
  • ✔EIC Pathfinder & Transition
  • ✔Civil Security research
research-and-innovation.ec.europa.eu ↗
EDIPEU · INDUSTRY
OPEN NOW · rolling 2025–2027

European Defence Industry Programme — bridging instrument to strengthen EU defence industry through 2027.

  • ✔Industrial production & capacity
  • ✔Joint procurement & standardisation
  • ✔Bridge to EDF 2028+
consilium.europa.eu — EDIP ↗
AGILE InitiativeEU · NEW
NEWLY APPROVED · calls coming soon

Newly approved EU initiative for agile defence R&I — rapid calls for industry and startups with defence potential, linked to EDIP and EDF 2028+.

  • ✔Rapid calls within 3 months
  • ✔Industry, SMEs & startups
  • ✔Link to EDIP and EDF 2028+
ec.europa.eu — AGILE calls ↗

We build the Czech defence and dual-use ecosystem and connect its players — startups, industry, research, investors and the armed forces.

[ Cooperation with Ukraine ]

Defence innovation hand-in-hand with Ukraine

Programs connecting the European and Ukrainian ecosystems — from funding to testing in real conditions.

BraveTech EUEU × UKRAINE

A joint European Commission–Ukraine initiative for defence innovation. Brings together the European Defence Fund (EDF), EUDIS and Ukraine's BRAVE1 platform.

  • ✔Up to €50M from the EU, matched by €50M from Ukraine
  • ✔Two phases: Seed and Scale Up
  • ✔EU–Ukraine matchmaking, joint development and testing
Programme detail →
Brave1PLATFORM · UKRAINE

The one-of-a-kind entry point for cooperation in Ukrainian defence tech — companies, startups, government, defence forces, investors, volunteer funds and media joining forces for victory through technology.

  • ✔Soft-landing and access to Ukrainian defence innovations
  • ✔Pitches, hackathons, grants and investments
  • ✔Development and testing of advanced technologies
brave1.gov.ua ↗
Invest in BraveryEVENTS · UKRAINE

A nonprofit organisation dedicated to supporting Ukraine's integration into the world economy through its powerful brand and its incredible people.

  • ✔Pitch Competition for defensetech and resiliencetech
  • ✔Prague Demo Day to 30+ European VCs
  • ✔Startups, investors and sponsors
investinbravery.com ↗
